chapter_title.en: Chapter on Testimony Based on Testimony

parts.text: سَأَلَ صَفْوَانُ بْنُ يَحْيَى أَبَا اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ :
رَجُلٍ أَشْهَدَ أَجِيرَهُ عَلَى شَهَادَةٍ ثُمَّ فَارَقَهُ أَ تَجُوزُ شَهَادَتُهُ بَعْدَ أَنْ يُفَارِقَهُ

text: "نَعَمْ" قُلْتُ فَيَهُودِيٌّ أُشْهِدَ عَلَى شَهَادَةٍ ثُمَّ أَسْلَمَ أَ تَجُوزُ شَهَادَتُهُ قَالَ "نَعَمْ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3354 - Safwan ibn Yahya asked Abu al-Hasan (as):
About a man who made his employee a witness to a testimony and then separated from him, would his testimony be valid after their separation?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
He further asked: What if a Jew was made a witness to a testimony and then embraced Islam, would his testimony be valid?
Imam (as) said: "Yes."
